findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name PathMatchingFilterChainResolver path resolution vs InvalidRequestFilter check
 * @description Examine which path method is used for filter chain matching vs which is validated
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-path-resolution-mismatch
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all calls to getRequestURI, getServletPath, getPathInfo, getPathWithinApplication, getRequestUri in filter chain resolver and related classes
from MethodCall mc
where
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "PathMatchingFilter") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.servlet", "AbstractShiroFilter") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils")
  ) and
  mc.getMethod().hasName(["getRequestURI", "getServletPath", "getPathInfo", "getPathWithinApplication", "getRequestUri", "normalize", "decodeRequestString", "removeSemicolon"])
select mc, mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Path resolution mismatch between filter chain matching path and validated path - potential authentication bypass

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name WebUtils.getPathWithinApplication - full call chain
 * @description Trace getPathWithinApplication to understand if decodeAndCleanUriString is called (after validation)
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-getpathwithinapplication-chain
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  m.getName() = "getPathWithinApplication" and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "getPathWithinApplication calls: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: getPathWithinApplication may decode URLs after validation has been done on raw URI

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter isAccessAllowed - what URI is validated
 * @description Check exactly what request attributes are checked by isAccessAllowed
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isaccess-allowed-uri-source
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, Expr e
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  m.getName() = "isAccessAllowed" and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select e, "isAccessAllowed line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + e.toString()
findings.hypothesis: What URI path does isAccessAllowed validate - raw requestURI, getServletPath, or getPathInfo

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter - exact arguments to isValid calls
 * @description Determine which request attributes (getRequestURI, getServletPath, getPathInfo) are passed to isValid
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isvalid-arguments
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall isValidCall, MethodCall argCall
where
  isValidCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  isValidCall.getMethod().getName() = "isValid" and
  argCall = isValidCall.getAnArgument()
select isValidCall, "isValid called at line " + isValidCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + " with argument: " + isValidCall.getAnArgument().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Determine which URI parts are passed to isValid for validation

message.text: isValid called at line 70 with argument: getPathInfo(...)
isValid called at line 68 with argument: getRequestURI(...)
isValid called at line 69 with argument: getServletPath(...)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter isValid - full body with variables and calls
 * @description Full body of isValid showing field accesses and String method calls
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isvalid-full-body
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, Stmt s
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  m.getName() = "isValid" and
  s.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select s, "isValid stmt at line " + s.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + s.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Full body of isValid to check whether toLowerCase is used before string contains checks

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter - case normalization and contains checks
 * @description Check whether InvalidRequestFilter uses toLowerCase before checking for %2e/%2f and also check how INVALID_URI list items are compared
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-case-normalization-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Check for any toLowerCase/toUpperCase usage in InvalidRequestFilter
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toUpperCase") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("anyMatch") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("stream") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("noneMatch") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("filter")
  )
select mc, "InvalidRequestFilter at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: InvalidRequestFilter may not normalize case before checking for encoded path sequences like %2E (uppercase), creating bypass opportunities

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal via getRequestURI in WebUtils
 * @description Investigates how Shiro resolves request paths, looking for path normalization issues
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-webutils-path-handling
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all methods in WebUtils that handle path strings
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName(["getRequestURI", "getServletPath", "getPathInfo", "getContextPath"]) or
    mc.getMethod().hasName(["startsWith", "contains", "indexOf"]) or
    mc.getMethod().hasName(["normalize", "cleanPath", "decode"])
  )
select mc, "WebUtils method '" + m.getName() + "' calls '" + mc.getMethod().getName() + "' at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: WebUtils path handling - investigating how request URIs are processed and whether path traversal sequences are adequately handled

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter string patterns and WebUtils normalize logic
 * @description Examine string patterns checked in InvalidRequestFilter and path normalization in WebUtils
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-path-validation-patterns
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from StringLiteral s
where
  s.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter")
  or
  s.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  s.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "normalize"
select s, s.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " in " + s.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + ": \"" + s.getValue() + "\""
findings.hypothesis: Examining what patterns InvalidRequestFilter blocks and how WebUtils.normalize works to identify bypass opportunities

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter isAccessAllowed logic - checking for toLowerCase usage
 * @description Check if InvalidRequestFilter normalizes case before checking for encoded sequences
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-invalid-request-filter-access-allowed
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  m.getName() = "isAccessAllowed" and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "isAccessAllowed calls: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + "(" + mc.getNumArgument() + " args) at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: isAccessAllowed in InvalidRequestFilter may not use case-insensitive comparison, allowing uppercase encoded bypasses
